member.name: T:ProxyStaker
member.summary: Information about a single account that is proxy staking.

member.name: M:ProxyStaker.#ctor(AccountId,System.Int64)
member.summary: The Account ID that is proxy staking.

member.name: M:ProxyStaker.#ctor(AccountId,System.Int64)_2
member.summary: The number of hbars that are currently proxy staked.

member.name: M:ProxyStaker.FromProtobuf(Proto.ProxyStaker)
member.summary: Create a proxy staker object from a protobuf.
